findings.description: PolicyRegistry design correctly scopes ungoverned logic detection to hardcoded thresholds and prompt-embedded rules
Policy entries marked immutable=True in artifact_store.put(). Cannot edit active policies post-creation
Fail-closed design: policy_registry.get_policy() returns None on error, policy lookup failures do not grant permission
Ungoverned logic audit detects: (1) hardcoded numeric thresholds, (2) decision logic in prompts. Test scenarios cover both
Policies versioned with semantic versioning and source_code_version (git commit). Silent policy updates prevented

approval_comment: PolicyRegistry design is sound. Fail-closed principles applied. Immutability enforced. Ungoverned logic audit surface is comprehensive. Design approved for implementation.
